description: Dogars is a Poison Type Pokémon that evolved into Matadogas. The name uses the English loanword "gas" (which is used by Japanese to refer to both gasoline and the state of matter), with the prefix "do" meaning "bad" or "poisonous". Dogars are often found near abandoned buildings (burned-out preferred), Caves and Volcanic rich environments. Dogars spew gases from their crater-like ridges that cover their body. Dogars have a Cyclops-like Skull and Cross Bones symbol on their chest and stomach. The Skull has three teeth detailed on it. Dogars have two small fangs protruding from the top of its mouth. Dogars often have a jolly or spaced-out expression while looking up. Kojiro from Team Rocket used a Dogars until it evolved into a Matadogas. In Pokémon Snap, Dogars can be seen following Purin around, causing the Purin discomfort. Dogars is also one of the Pokémon signs as well as a star constellation in the game.
name: Dogars
